project_type: Static HTML product pages site with shared CSS design system
verification_instructions: Open the HTML file in a browser and verify all sections render, calculator works, number formatting is correct
setup_instructions: No setup needed - static HTML project
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - no external packages can be installed. All work is static HTML/CSS/JS.
contribution_requirements:
Product pages use shared style.css from /assets/style.css. Pages include
and
placeholders. Pages include at the end. Page-specific styles go in inline
key_patterns:
1. Product pages link to /assets/style.css (absolute path). 2. Use CSS variables from style.css (--jade, --tangerine, --txt-head, etc). 3. Keyword highlighting uses .kw (jade green), .kw-cta (tangerine), .kw-gold (gold) classes. 4. Pages have
at top of body and
before scripts. 5. Calculator JS is inline in the page. 6. Dark mode support via html.dark class.
relevant_files: public/pages/mccp.html - existing product page pattern (structure, header/footer placeholders, calculator pattern)
public/assets/style.css - shared design system with CSS variables, layout classes, component styles
Sample/Mifip.html - reference content and calculator logic (787 lines) with full working calculator
Source/MiFiP/ - source materials (PDFs/Excel for content reference)
directory_structure: public/pages/ - product HTML pages, public/assets/ - shared CSS and JS, Sample/ - reference HTML pages, Source/ - source PDFs and Excel files
